Class ActionMethodReturn

java.lang.Object
com.iohao.net.framework.core.ActionMethodReturn
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActualParameter
public final class ActionMethodReturn extends Object implements ActualParameter
Metadata about an action method's return type, including generic type resolution for List return types.
Since:
25.1
Author:
渔民小镇
date:
2025-09-09

    • toString

      public String toString(boolean fullName)
      Format the return type as a string, optionally using fully qualified class names.

      formatted return type string
